channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Jobs & Internships
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe vacancies plus the three rolling Mutapa Times internships (Social, Editor, Data). Each item ships with a branded card image for the social autolist.

item.title: Social Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Editor Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Data Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Marist Brothers High School, Dete — Driver/ Boarding Master
item.description: Marist Brothers is a mission school.It is looking for a Boarding Master whose primary responsibility is to look at the welfare of male students/ Doing school errands Hwange · Part Time (via vacancymail.co.zw) #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Marist Brothers High School, Dete

item.title: Volsec Security — CCTV OPERATORS
item.description: Responsible for monitoring surveillance security cameras within the shop ensuring security and safety of the client’s property, personnel and customers. Harare · Full Time (via vacancymail.co.zw) #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Volsec Security

item.title: Volsec Security — INSPECTOR
item.description: Reporting to the Operations Controller. The position entails supervision of sites and guards effectively. Harare · Full Time (via vacancymail.co.zw) #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Volsec Security

item.title: Finance Executive : Hungwe Wire and Rope
item.description: HUNGWE WIRE AND ROPE (PVT) LTD is inviting applications from suitably qualified and experienced individuals for the position of Finance Executive based in Kwekwe. item.title: Zimbabwe Ezekiel Guti University — LECTURER/SENIOR LECTURER/ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR/PROFESSOR (1 POST) FOR BCOM HONOURS IN ACCOUNTING – DEPARTMENT OF ACCOUNTING, FINANCE AND HUMAN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT

item.title: Marist Brothers High School, Dete — ’A’ Level FRS & Heritage Teacher
item.description: Marist Brothers is a mission school. It is looking for a FRS & Heritage Teacher whose primary responsibility is to teach. Hwange · Part Time (via vacancymail.co.zw) #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
